prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年最低位次分别为约7422名、14964名、8769名、20584名、11263名，整体波动较大，2025年基准位次约11263名。近两年位次在8769–20584之间大幅震 荡，2025年较2024年明显回升，显示该校在山西省的报考热度有所恢复；2021–2025年本省理科/物理类计划分别为14人、18人、16人、18人、22人，呈逐步扩招 趋势；2026年计划22人，与2025年持平，扩招趋势暂缓，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京工业大学为211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约 第65名，属全国中上游水平，在北京市属高校中排名第一，工科实力突出；2022年高考周期内该校曾出现拟录取研究生不当言论事件，声誉评价偏负面；2026年 周期内再次出现类似师德师风事件，可能对部分考生报考意愿产生轻微抑制。抖音热度排名第57（较热），短视频平台曝光度一般，未出现明显爆款传播。未见投档线断档记录。 第五轮学科评估中，环境科学与工程获评A，土木工程、软件工程、光学工程、材料科学与工程获评A-，工科基础扎实。软件工程（实验班）为该校在山西省招 生热门专业，历年位次均居前列。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度持续偏高，与该校优势学科方向契合，有利于维持报考热度。山西省202 6年物理类考生约167419人，较2025年173347人减少约3.4%，考生规模小幅缩减，竞争压力略有缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动较大、2026年招生计划与2025年持平、考生总数小幅减少约3.4%以及声誉偏负面等因素，预计2026年录 取位次在2025年基准11263名基础上略有前移（竞争略缓解）。预测最低位次约11233名，区间10733–11733名。

- 人工智能（实验班）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间10733–11733名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如10500名以内）可重点冲刺软件工程（实验班）等王 牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如11500名以上）建议以三档土木类、化学生物学等专业保底，同时关注二档中自动化、材料类等专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings were approximately 7422, 14964, 8769, 20584, and 11263 respectively, showing significant fluctuations overall, with a baseline ranking of about 11263 in 2025. In the past two years, rankings fluctuated widely between 8769 and 20584, and in 2025, there was a notable recovery compared to 2024, indicating a rebound in the popularity of this university among Shanxi applicants. From 2021 to 2025, the provincial science/physics category enrollment plans were 14, 18, 16, 18, and 22 students respectively, showing a gradual expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 22 students, unchanged from 2025, with the expansion trend pausing, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranking approximately 65th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, placing it in the upper-middle tier nationally and first among Beijing municipal universities, with outstanding engineering strength. During the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced an incident involving inappropriate remarks by a proposed graduate student, leading to a somewhat negative reputation evaluation. In the 2026 cycle, a similar teacher ethics incident occurred again, which may slightly suppress some applicants' willingness to apply. Its Douyin popularity ranks 57th (relatively hot), with moderate exposure on short video platforms and no obvious viral content. No record of admission cutoff line drops was found. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Environmental Science and Engineering received an A rating, while Civil Engineering, Software Engineering, Optical Engineering, and Materials Science and Engineering received A- ratings, indicating a solid engineering foundation. Software Engineering (Experimental Class) is a popular major for this university in Shanxi, consistently ranking high over the years.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity for engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication remains consistently high, aligning with the university's advantageous disciplines, which helps maintain application enthusiasm. In 2026, the number of physics category candidates in Shanxi is approximately 167,419, a decrease of about 3.4% from 173,347 in 2025, with a slight reduction in candidate scale, leading to a slight easing of competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as significant historical ranking fluctuations, the 2026 enrollment plan unchanged from 2025, a slight 3.4% decrease in total candidates, and a somewhat negative reputation, it is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will slightly move forward (competition slightly eases) from the 2025 baseline of 11263. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 11233, with a range of 10733 to 11733.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 10733 to 11733, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 10500), prioritize aiming for flagship majors like Software Engineering (Experimental Class). If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 11500), it is advisable to use Tier 3 majors such as Civil Engineering Category and Chemical Biology as safety options, while also considering Tier 2 majors like Automation and Materials Category.
